My Projects

🤖
Published

Garbage Robot

This autonomous refuse bot navigates with a front ultrasonic sensor and vision camera, driven by two stepper motors controlled by an L298N driver. A lid actuator servo opens the refuse container, all powered by a 12V LiPo battery and managed by a Raspberry Pi controller with voice output.

10 parts

Today

Built by 3E8 Robotics | Terms of Service
